properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v3 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Everything else can wait I’ve come to seek Your face So everything can wait I’m here for You I want to

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Just be here at your feet Just be here on my knees Here in Your presence I am complete Jesus, You’re all that I need

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There’s nothing I want more ‘Cause nothing matters more There’s nothing I want more ‘Cause nothing matters more There’s nothing I want more ‘Cause nothing matters more There’s nothing I want more ‘Cause nothing matters more

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I’ll just be here at your feet Just be here on my knees Here in Your presence I am complete Jesus, You’re all that I need

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I’ll just be here at your feet Just be here on my knees Here in Your presence I am complete Jesus, You’re all that I need Jesus, You’re all that I need Jesus, You’re all that I need
